base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dragonlord_phase_2_idle — a character (final_boss) from 1986 dragon quest. Dragonlord Phase 2 — massive purple dragon form with horns + wings. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dragonlord Phase 2 — massive purple dragon form with horns + wings; final-boss. Breathes fire (Fireball spell), high HP/damage. Series-origin final boss
